fields.name: Sunburst Holiday Park
fields.description: A family-focused holiday park on the coast, home to caravans, cottages and a large outdoor pool complex.

fields.name: Galactic Theme Park
fields.description: Ireland's space-themed theme park with four roller coasters, a VR ride and a seasonal parade.

fields.name: Azure Beach Resort
fields.description: A four-star beachfront resort with spa, restaurants and conference suites overlooking the Atlantic.

fields.name: WildRush Adventure Park
fields.description: High ropes, zip lines, kayaking and forest trails for schools, stags, hens and family groups.
